I literally just got banned for 2 hours for trolling a moderator for 5 seconds or a co developer which i know sounds like im in the wrong but I dont really care if im in the wrong over all, so basically I went in some other people's skybase in sandbox which is a game mode where you can build, once i made a house i went up and started trolling them and stopped to stop my ridiculous act and then the mod came in and from i freaking saw he flung me a bit or I tried to trap him like what the others did then when I kept going he flunged me around because I trapped to trap him and then when I didn't stop he actually BANNED me for 2 hours technically 1 hour and 59 minutes and 13 seconds i think was it or more seconds and people can dislike me I dont care because I technically have anger issues so im dont give 2 frog poops on what anyone says about or to me its my opinion and I got angered I bit too so not only am I annoyed im just enraged because of this stupid timer and the moderator because  2 hours is absolutely ridiculous especially when he didn't even say stop and I also didn't even believe he was really a moderator, but a mistake is a mistake, now i learn to stop when someone does or doesn't tell me to, as much as I love this game i refuse to stay with my original name and instead use a different name, voice, skin color, look, and many more, no hate and it was really my fault, bye V tag.

developer_response.body:
Just to clarify what happened, you weren’t banned for “5 seconds of trolling.”

You were barking at and harassing multiple players in the lobby, and several people asked you to stop. Instead of stopping, you followed me and my friend into another game mode and continued doing the same thing. At that point, multiple players again asked you to stop.

I warned you that if the harassment continued you would be banned. The behavior continued after the warning, so the ban was applied.

The ban was only 2 hours, which is actually a pretty light penalty for that kind of behavior. I do appreciate you acknowledging at the end of your post that it was a mistake.

No hard feelings just please respect other players and moderator warnings going forward so we can keep the game enjoyable for everyone.

reviews.review_title: Why do admins abuse the kick gun?!
reviews.review_description: Bro a admin or something kicked me for tagging him and not just that people where toxic and saying slurs in every lobby But other then that its a good game.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Just to clarify, there isn’t a working kick gun in the game, so nobody can use that. Our moderators play the game a lot, and we haven’t seen widespread slurs—maybe in one or two lobbies at most if theres no mods online.

If you see anyone breaking the rules, please report them in-game or on Discord with a video, and we’ll make sure they get a guaranteed ban.
